blockingIssues.description: VAL-DAEMON-008 contract requires unsupported workflow intent to fail pre-execution, but planner intent resolution currently falls back and allows execution path continuation.
OpenBurnBarAgentStackTests codify fallback/no-throw behavior for unsupported workflow intent, which conflicts with VAL-DAEMON-008 required failure semantics.
Worker handoff commit traceability failed: recorded commitId 62ef19b8 does not include m3 typed planner input code changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update mission-core-worker SKILL validator command snippets to use BurnBar* XCTest filters from .factory/services.yaml so workers do not run zero-match OpenBurnBar* filters.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer found .factory/skills/mission-core-worker/SKILL.md uses OpenBurnBar* filters while .factory/services.yaml and active tests use BurnBar* names.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to verify handoff commit IDs map to their feature diff (for example, git rev-parse/git show sanity check) before ending feature runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m3-typed-planner-input handoff used commitId 62ef19b8, which only changed m2 validation artifacts and broke feature traceability.

rejectedObservations.reason: captured as a blocking feature issue; not applied as shared state documentation update in this scrutiny pass
